name: Rumaki Pate
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Canned water chestnuts (drained & coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the chicken livers, a few at a time.
2. Add the chopped liver to the blender or food processor.
3. When all the liver is chopped, add soy sauce, butter (softened), onion salt, mustard, nutmeg, and hot pepper sauce.
4. Blend until smooth and well mixed, scraping down sides frequently.
5. Add water chestnuts and bacon; mix thoroughly by hand.
6. Spoon the mixture into 1 large or 5 small molds, pressing firmly to remove all air pockets.
7. Chill the pate.
8. To unmold, dip the mold quickly into hot water up to the rim, then allow it to soften to room temperature before serving.
9. Garnish with chopped green onion.
10. Serve with melba toast or crackers. Makes about 1 1/2 cups.
